title: Process of Storing User-Defined Classes in Java Collections
description: A flowchart illustrating the necessary steps and considerations for correctly storing custom objects in Java Collections like ArrayList or HashSet.
relationships: Class must be defined before objects can be created
Correctly overriding equals/hashCode enables proper operation in Hash-based collections
Implementing Comparable enables sorting in ordered collections
Objects are added to the collection instance
The collection can then be used for various operations
